tasks.subject: Task 1: Add config plumbing for required guild/role env vars
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New env vars are read by runtime.exs and stored under :soundboard app config keys.

**Files:** config/runtime.exs, .env.example

**Verify:** mix compile --warnings-as-errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["config/runtime.exs", ".env.example"], "verifyCommand": "mix compile --warnings-as-errors", "acceptanceCriteria": ["required_guild_id defaults nil", "required_role_ids defaults []", "role_recheck_interval_seconds defaults 900"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement Soundboard.Discord.RoleChecker with TDD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New module wraps EDA.API.Member.get/2 with feature_enabled?/0 and authorized?/1.

**Files:** lib/soundboard/discord/role_checker.ex, test/soundboard/discord/role_checker_test.exs

**Verify:** mix test test/soundboard/discord/role_checker_test.exs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/soundboard/discord/role_checker.ex", "test/soundboard/discord/role_checker_test.exs"], "verifyCommand": "mix test test/soundboard/discord/role_checker_test.exs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["feature_enabled? correct", "authorized? short-circuits when disabled", "matches any required role", "false on error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add login-time role check to AuthController
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OAuth callback verifies role membership before creating local user. Stores :user_id and :roles_verified_at on success.

**Files:** lib/soundboard_web/controllers/auth_controller.ex, test/soundboard_web/controllers/auth_controller_test.exs

**Verify:** mix test test/soundboard_web/controllers/auth_controller_test.exs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/soundboard_web/controllers/auth_controller.ex", "test/soundboard_web/controllers/auth_controller_test.exs"], "verifyCommand": "mix test test/soundboard_web/controllers/auth_controller_test.exs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["authorized branch sets both session keys", "unauthorized creates no user record", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Implement SoundboardWeb.Plugs.RoleCheck with TDD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Plug runs after ensure_authenticated_user. Re-verifies via RoleChecker when timestamp is stale/missing. Halts and clears session on failure.

**Files:** lib/soundboard_web/plugs/role_check.ex, test/soundboard_web/plugs/role_check_test.exs

**Verify:** mix test test/soundboard_web/plugs/role_check_test.exs

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/soundboard_web/plugs/role_check.ex", "test/soundboard_web/plugs/role_check_test.exs"], "verifyCommand": "mix test test/soundboard_web/plugs/role_check_test.exs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pass through cases skip API", "stale/missing triggers re-check", "unauthorized halts and clears"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire RoleCheck plug into protected pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Both protected scopes invoke the plug. Full precommit passes.

**Files:** lib/soundboard_web/router.ex

**Verify:** mix precommit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/soundboard_web/router.ex"], "verifyCommand": "mix precommit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pipeline defined", "both scopes wired", "full precommit passes"]}
```
